<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Erleada is indicated:  in adult men for the treatment of non metastatic castration resistant prostate cancer (nmCRPC) who are at high risk of developing metastatic disease. in adult men for the...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>prostate cancer/brain cancer susceptibility（98.4%）</li>
<li>prostate leiomyoma（97.8%）</li>
<li>Brenner tumor（97.6%）</li>
<li>prostate cancer（97.6%）</li>
<li>benign reproductive system neoplasm（97.5%）</li>
<li>fibroma of prostate（97.5%）</li>
<li>prostate phyllodes tumor（97.5%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of prostate（97.5%）</li>
<li>male reproductive organ cancer（97.4%）</li>
<li>benign prostate phyllodes tumor（97.2%）</li>
<li>palmoplantar keratoderma-sclerodactyly syndrome（97.0%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（96.7%）</li>
<li>peripheral neuropathy-myopathy-hoarseness-hearing loss syndrome（96.1%）</li>
<li>renal cell carcinoma (disease)（94.5%）</li>
<li>renal pelvis carcinoma（94.3%）</li>
<li>CMM7（93.8%）</li>
<li>renal carcinoma（93.7%）</li>
<li>renal cell carcinoma associated with Xp11.2 translocations/TFE3 gene fusions（93.6%）</li>
<li>renal cell carcinoma associated with neuroblastoma（93.6%）</li>
<li>unclassified renal cell carcinoma（93.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
